rankings.reason: Best alignment with the 2050 futuristic theme, incorporating advanced AI, robotics, and immersive technology as requested.
Good focus on convenience and automation, though it lacks the high-tech, visionary flair of Option A.
Practical and useful, but focuses on existing capsule hotel technology rather than innovative, futuristic airport design.
Weakest entry; it lacks futuristic elements and fails to provide the required marketing slogans.
